[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 100111001 5
2 111100111 7
3 001100011 4
4 110111110 7
5 111111100 7
6 011111111 8
7 011011111 7
